data.title: Accor Files 2023 Universal Registration Document Highlighting 2024 Financial Strategies
data.description:
Accor SA ( (FR:AC) ) has shared an announcement.

Accor has filed its 2023 Universal Registration Document with the Autorité des Marchés Financiers, which includes the 2024 annual financial report, corporate governance details, and a share buyback program. This document is available to the public and provides comprehensive insights into Accor’s financial and operational strategies, potentially impacting stakeholders by highlighting the company’s commitment to transparency and strategic planning.

More about Accor SA

Accor is a global leader in the hospitality industry, offering a diverse range of services including hotels, restaurants, bars, wellness, and coworking spaces across more than 110 countries. With a portfolio of around 45 brands, Accor caters to various market segments from luxury to economy. The company is committed to responsible tourism, sustainable development, and diversity, and operates a loyalty program called ALL. Founded in 1967, Accor is headquartered in France and is listed on Euronext Paris and the OTC market in the United States.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €10.77B

data.title: Rightmove Continues Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Rightmove ( (GB:RMV) ) has issued an update.

Rightmove plc announced the purchase of 150,000 of its own shares as part of an ongoing share buy-back program, with the shares acquired at an average price of 688.048p. This transaction represents a continuation of their long-term strategy to return value to shareholders, having repurchased over 527 million shares since 2007, thereby reducing the number of shares in circulation and potentially increasing the value of remaining shares.

More about Rightmove

Rightmove plc operates in the real estate industry, primarily providing an online property portal for buying, selling, and renting properties in the UK. The company focuses on offering digital solutions to connect property seekers with real estate agents and developers.

data.title: Howden Joinery Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Howden Joinery ( (GB:HWDN) ) has provided an update.

Howden Joinery Group PLC announced the repurchase and cancellation of 50,000 ordinary shares at an average price of 737.16 pence per share, as part of its ongoing buyback program. This transaction reduces the number of shares in circulation, potentially increasing the value of remaining shares and affecting shareholder voting rights.

More about Howden Joinery

Howden Joinery Group PLC operates in the manufacturing and retail industry, primarily focusing on the production and sale of kitchen and joinery products. The company targets the trade market, providing products to builders and tradespeople.

data.title: Equinox Gold to Merge with Calibre Mining, Boosting Production and Market Position
data.description:
Equinox Gold ( (TSE:EQX) ) has provided an update.

Equinox Gold Corp. announced a merger with Calibre Mining Corp., aiming to become a major Americas-focused gold producer with over 1.2 million ounces of annual gold production. The merger, expected to elevate Equinox Gold’s market position, will result in substantial free cash flow and growth opportunities, enhancing shareholder value and positioning the company as the second largest gold producer in Canada.

More about Equinox Gold

Equinox Gold Corp. is a diversified gold producer operating in the mining industry, with a focus on producing gold from its mines in Canada, California, Mexico, and Brazil. The company aims to achieve over one million ounces of annual gold production and holds a significant gold reserve and resource base.

data.title: M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc Corrects Major Holdings Notification
data.description:
M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc ( (GB:MGCI) ) just unveiled an update.

M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc announced a correction to a previous notification regarding major holdings. The corrected announcement specifies that the threshold for voting rights was crossed on March 25, 2025, with M&G Plc holding 24.194172% of the voting rights, a decrease from the previous 25.784344%. This adjustment in holdings may impact the company’s governance dynamics and stakeholder interests, as it reflects a change in the distribution of voting power.

More about M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc

M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc operates within the financial services industry, focusing on investment management. The company is based in the United Kingdom and is involved in managing credit income investments, primarily targeting institutional and retail investors seeking income through diversified credit portfolios.

data.title: Rosie’s Burgers Expands with New Franchise in Mississauga
data.description:
The latest update is out from Happy Belly Food Group ( (TSE:HBFG) ).

Rosie’s Burgers, a boutique quick-service restaurant brand under Happy Belly Food Group, has signed its 11th franchise agreement for a new location in Mississauga, Ontario. This expansion is part of a broader strategy to grow both corporate and franchise locations across Canada, leveraging a strong franchise support system and an asset-light model to accelerate growth and strengthen the brand’s market presence.

More about Happy Belly Food Group

Happy Belly Food Group Inc. is a leading consolidator of emerging food brands, focusing on the development and growth of these brands within the food sector.

data.title: Banca Sistema Announces Board Resignations to Facilitate Governance Overhaul
data.description:
Banca Sistema S.p.A. ( (IT:BST) ) has shared an announcement.

Banca Sistema S.p.A. announced the resignations of four directors, two statutory auditors, and the President of the Board of Statutory Auditors, effective from the shareholders’ meeting on April 30, 2025. This move is part of a new corporate governance project aimed at refreshing the board’s composition, as requested by the Bank of Italy. The resignations are intended to facilitate the transition and ensure continuity within the control body, with the assembly set to appoint new directors and auditors. The announcement underscores the company’s commitment to aligning with regulatory expectations and enhancing its governance structure.

More about Banca Sistema S.p.A.

Banca Sistema S.p.A., established in 2011 and publicly listed since 2015 on the Euronext Star Milan segment of Borsa Italiana, specializes in purchasing commercial credits towards Public Administration and tax credits. It also engages in the assignment of salary and pension credits, alongside offering a range of financial products and services, including current and deposit accounts, credit management, and electronic invoicing. The group operates in Italy and other European countries, serving over 100,000 clients with a multichannel approach.

YTD Price Performance: 39.20%

Average Trading Volume: 5,768

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €138.6M

data.title: WideOpenWest Investigates Suspicious Activity on Cloud Platform
data.description:
Wideopenwest ( (WOW) ) has shared an update.

WideOpenWest, Inc. recently identified suspicious activity on its back-office cloud platform and promptly initiated an incident response, disabling access to the affected application. The ongoing investigation has not revealed any material impact on the company’s operations or financial conditions, and no sensitive personal information appears to have been accessed by external parties.

More about Wideopenwest

WideOpenWest, Inc. operates in the telecommunications industry, providing broadband and cable services to residential and business customers. The company focuses on delivering high-speed internet, cable television, and digital phone services.

data.title: BlackRock Reduces Stake in AIB Group
data.description:
The latest update is out from AIB Group ( (AIBRF) ).

AIB Group plc, a non-UK issuer, has reported a change in major holdings due to BlackRock, Inc.’s acquisition or disposal of voting rights and financial instruments. As of March 26, 2025, BlackRock’s total voting rights in AIB Group have decreased to 8.47% from a previous 10.18%, indicating a reduction in their stake in the company. This change in holdings may impact AIB Group’s shareholder dynamics and could influence future corporate decisions.

data.title: Cannabis Sativa Delays Form 10-K Filing
data.description:
Cannabis Sativa ( (CBDS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Cannabis Sativa, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The primary reason for the delay is the recent engagement of a new independent registered public accounting firm on December 18, 2024, which requires additional time to review and approve the company’s financial statements. The company anticipates filing the delayed report by April 14, 2025. There are no expected significant changes in financial results from the previous fiscal year. The company is committed to ensuring compliance with applicable accounting standards and regulations, as indicated by the signature of CEO David Tobias on the notification.

More about Cannabis Sativa
